Temp. Down
DBGT.com Version 2.0

  Update
2003'5'28 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey sorry I havn's been doing much lately, I'm in the middle of some really important exams. Also I would like to appologise for the errors on the gallery, and on the pgd.fx toplist yestarday, and at the start of today, that problem is nearly fixed. Thanks to majingohan we have a media host, it wont allow us much space, but its better than nothing, I will have the full movies up as soon as possible. Thanks for being so patient.

Fixed Links
2003'5'26 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, the content I put up yesterday was linked incorrectly. A huge thanks goes out to Phazed for telling me of this problem. I've fixed the links to both tutorials, and now you can go download them and check'em out / MG Out...

*Metal Structure Tutorial
*Mac Tab Tutorial

Finally Getting Around To Things
2003'5'25 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, yes, I once again take the blame for not having any new content. Yes I'll admit it, I'm lazy, so I owe an apology to the staff and a huge apology to Manral whose been doing tons of hard work. So for now, I've gotten up two new tutorials of his for Adobe Photoshop. I've made it a little different this time though, as these tutorials arn't online, but there downloadable, so you can view them any time. Both are excellent easy to follow tutorials with picture guides, so download the tutorials and have fun / I'll try to get more content going for all of you a.s.a.p / MG Out...

*Metal Structure Tutorial
*Mac Tab Tutorial

Make a layout
2003'5'23 ++ posted by Manral
I put a new Photoshop tutorial explaining how to make a glass looking layout, its pretty cool go to sukeert.deviantart.com and select Glass layout from the list, I hope you find it good.
Later
--Manral

Energy Article Posted
2003'5'22 ++ posted by The Prophecy
Hey everyone, MG posted my energy article, its my first piece of work at DBGT where I discuss different things about energy (ki) and how saiyans are effected by all this stuff, wanna find out? Well then check out my Energy Article
Peace

*The True Meaning of Energy



The Prophey has come.............
2003'5'20 ++ posted by The Prophecy
What up people, I have finally brought you news of my coming. I am the new article writer for this fine site. I would like to give my grattitude to Majin Gohan, because he's the one who accepted me kindly. Alright, I just finished making my energy story thats quite interesting, and MG will post it when he has time. Oh yeah, and Valix needs thanking because he vouched for me. So now get ready, because I have been summoned.

More photoshop tutorials
2003'5'18 ++ posted by Manral
All right I sended more tutorials to MG but I guess he's very busy so y'all have to wait for him to post the tutorials here's the total list of tutorials I made:
Building Mac Tabs
Building Silver/Metallic looking header
Building real looking crystals
Building Graphite navbars.

--Manral

P.S. You can go to http://sukeert.deviantart.com for the tutorials if till its posted when its posted i'll remove the link.

just an update
2003'5'17 ++ posted by Mystic Gojita
Hey ya'll, this is just an update on how DBNG's going and stuff. School's allmost out <~~~~HAAALEIGHLUJA~~~~> so I should be getting a little more done on ep. #7 < Sorry I haven't finished yet>.
Mystic Gojita

*** Also, sorry I haven't replyed if you've mail'd me. But for some reason I cant get into my dbgt.com mail address. So MG, I need you to contact me on AIM or mail me at joshykid77@yahoo.com

Back Again WIth A Few Words
2003'5'16 ++ posted by Valix
This is valix here, Ive been gone doing other stuff believe it or not ^_^. Some tutorials are coming from me by this sunday for photoshop for all you new webbies out there that learning how to use photoshop this will be a huge help. Also a couple of flash tutorials since everyone can't use flash so good I've decided to drop some tutorials on everyone to help out. One more thing paintshop pro tutorials will be coming soon also by the way check out my new site http://groups.msn.com/DBZInfinity it is a DBZ RPG got pretty bored since my last post here at DBGT so i decided to make a rpg of it. It's pretty good for my first ever one...check it out!-P.S. I'am The Graphics Master Of The World!

Quick Turn Around!
2003'5'14 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, wow that was fast. Just yesterday, DBGT was in the dumps, but now it looks like we're back on track with the return of Draton. He'll be helping keep DBGT organized for all you folks, because you can clearly see without him we are lost! Anyways, for now I've done a quick couple changes, I saw that the poll was messed, since it had no question, so I fixed that up. Also I changed the miscellaneous banner on the left nav since our latest goody is our Full Movies. Anyways, staff has given me many game reviews and tutorials and me and Draton will work hard to try to get those up for you by this weekend. Welcome back Draton!!! Happy Days!!! / MG Out...

Website Bio:
Layout Revision: 04/18/03
Site Creation: -'97
Webmaster: Majin Gohan
Founded By: Ruben Rodas
Site Layout Copyright: Pgd
Live Stats: 7 users online

Site News: The Site is moving along and growing gradually, it may be slow, but we are moving at a good steady pace so this site can regain the calibur it once had. We currently have an excellent staff who is bringing you lots of original information and interaction on the site. We're also constantly working on having media up, and having it stay up for as long as possible / Keep Visitng /

Majin Gohan is literally working all the time for you, the DBGT fans. He works on everything the staff dishes to him plus projects of his own. So make sure you visit DBGT often for his updates.

Donate: Running the site is getting harder and harder because of the server costs, which are well over $100. Since we need a really good server to suit DBGT's needs and to give a pleasant time for you the fans, it could be made easier however through donations. So if you got a couple extra bucks lying around or just want to help us out, please donate to the site using the paypal button below / Thank You All! /
Our Media Host:
